title: 2025.5.07Introducing Stripe Workflows: Tailoring Payments to Your Business NeedsSummary:Today, Stripe launches Stripe Workflows, a powerful new way to automate your payment operations and orchestrate Stripe products with ease—right from the Dashboard. Whether you are looking to streamline invoicing, manage fraud detection, automate subscription logic, or build custom quote-to-cash flows, Stripe Workflows helps developers move faster with fewer lines of code.
